---
title: "Emmy Utilization Report"
subtitle: "`r params$state_name` | `r params$report_month`"
format:
  pdf:
    geometry: margin=0.75in
    fontsize: 10pt
    fig-width: 6
    fig-height: 2.5
    toc: false
    keep-tex: false
    latex-engine: xelatex 
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{booktabs}
            \usepackage{colortbl}
            \usepackage{fontspec}
            \usepackage{xcolor}
            \usepackage{fancyhdr}
            \usepackage{graphicx}
            \definecolor{footergray}{HTML}{888888}
            \definecolor{subtletext}{HTML}{505050}
            \setmainfont{Source Sans 3}
            \setsansfont{Source Sans 3}
            \renewcommand{\familydefault}{\sfdefault}
            \makeatletter
            \renewcommand{\maketitle}{
              {\raggedright
                {\fontsize{24}{28}\selectfont\bfseries\@title\par}
                \vspace{4pt}
                {\fontsize{14}{18}\selectfont\@subtitle\par}
                \vspace{12pt}
              }
            }
            \makeatother
include-before-body:
  text: |
    \pagestyle{fancy}
    \fancyhf{}
    \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
    \fancyhead[R]{\includegraphics[height=0.5in]{assets/DSAC-Logo-3line-blue.png}}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    dev: ragg_png
    dpi: 330
params:
  state_name: "Louisiana"
  report_month: "March 2026"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---


```{r}
#| label: setup

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(gt, warn.conflicts = FALSE)
library(gtExtras)
library(gridExtra)
library(scales)
library(arrow)
library(emmytics)
library(systemfonts, warn.conflicts = FALSE)
```


```{r}
#| label: load data

df_pd <- read_parquet("Dataout/report_period.parquet")
df_ban <- read_parquet("Dataout/report_ban.parquet")
df_trend <- read_parquet("Dataout/report_trend.parquet")
df_dropoff <- read_parquet("Dataout/report_dropoff.parquet")
df_addtl <- read_parquet("Dataout/report_addtl.parquet")
df_searches_top <- read_parquet("Dataout/report_searches.parquet")
```


```{r}
#| label: ban-table
#| fig-height: 1.4
#| fig-width:  7
#| out-width: "100%"


# Positions: evenly spaced box centres on a 0-1 x scale
n_metrics <- nrow(df_ban)
card_w    <- 1 / n_metrics

df_ban <- df_ban |>
  mutate(x = (row_number() - 0.5) / n_metrics)

ggplot(df_ban) +
  # ── Card background ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  geom_tile(
    aes(x = x, y = 0.5, width = card_w - 0.01, height = 1),
    family = "Source Sans 3",
    fill = "#E8EDF4", color = "#C0C8D8", linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  # ── Label (top) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  geom_text(
    aes(x = x, y = 0.82, label = toupper(label)),
    family = "Source Sans 3",
    size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "#444444",
    lineheight = 0.9, vjust = 0.5
  ) +
  # ── BAN value (middle) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  geom_text(
    aes(x = x, y = 0.45, label = curr_fmt),
    family = "Source Sans 3",
    size = 12, fontface = "bold", color = dsac_navy, #"#111111", 
    vjust = 0.5
  ) +
  # ── Delta (bottom) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  geom_text(
    aes(x = x, y = 0.12, label = delta_fmt),
    family = "Source Sans 3",
    size = 2.2, fontface = "italic", color = "#888888", vjust = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2))
```


```{r}
#| label: daily_trend
#| fig-height: 3.7
#| fig-width: 7

# Build weekend highlight rectangles
weekends <- df_trend |>
  distinct(date) |>
  filter(weekdays(date) %in% c("Saturday", "Sunday")) |>
  mutate(
    xmin = date - 0.5,
    xmax = date + 0.5
  )

df_trend |> 
    ggplot(aes(date, n)) +
    geom_rect(
      data = weekends,
      aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      fill = "gray90",
      alpha = 0.6
    ) +
    geom_col(width = .8, fill = dsac_light_navy) +
    geom_text(aes(label = n), color = "#606060", family = "Source Sans 3", size = 7/.pt, vjust = -1) +
    facet_wrap(~event, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_y_continuous(position = "left") +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 9, base_family = "Source Sans 3") +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x =  element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0)
    )

```


::: {layout-ncol=2}

```{r}
#| label: viz_funnel
#| title: "Applicant Journey + Drop Off Rate"
#| fig-height: 3

df_dropoff |> 
  mutate(
    event_clean_n = str_glue("{event_clean} ({label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale())(n)})"),
    event_clean_n = fct_inorder(event_clean_n)
    ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(n, fct_rev(event_clean_n), group = "x")) +
  geom_blank(aes(n * 1.3)) +
  geom_col(aes(n_lag), alpha = .3, width = .8, fill = dsac_pale_navy, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = n_lag, xmax = n_lag), color = dsac_pale_navy) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = n_lag, xend = n * 1.02), color = dsac_pale_navy, na.rm = TRUE, 
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(.2, "cm"), type = "closed")) +
  geom_col(fill = dsac_light_navy, width = .8, na.rm = TRUE) +
  # geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = prior, xmax = prior), color = "#909090") +
  geom_text(
    aes(x = n_lag, label = loss_share), 
    hjust = -.1, na.rm = TRUE, color = "#505050", 
    family = "Source Sans 3", size = 4
    ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    label = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale()), 
    position = "top", expand = c(.005,.005)
    ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = NULL,
    title = "Applicant Journey"
    ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal(
    base_size = 18, base_family = "Source Sans 3"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(4, 4, 4, 4),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title = element_text(family = "Source Sans 3", size = 22, face = "bold")
    )
```


```{r}
#| label: additional_table
#| fig-height: 3


n_rows   <- nrow(df_addtl)
row_h    <- 1 / (n_rows + 1)   # +1 reserves space for the header row
header_y <- 1 - row_h / 2
stripe_col <- c("white", "#F2F4F7")

tbl_data <- df_addtl |>
  select(metric_clean, curr, prior) |>
  mutate(
    row_id = row_number(),
    y      = 1 - (row_id + 1) * row_h + row_h / 2  # top-down, below header
  )

ggplot(tbl_data) +
  # ── Row stripe backgrounds (data-driven, geom_tile fine here) ───────────
  geom_tile(
    aes(x = 0.5, y = y, height = row_h, fill = factor(row_id %% 2)),
    width = 1, color = NA, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  # ── Header background (single row — use annotate) ───────────────────────
  annotate("rect",
    xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = header_y - row_h / 2, ymax = header_y + row_h / 2,
    fill = dsac_light_navy
  ) +
  # ── Header labels (single row — use annotate) ───────────────────────────
  annotate("text", x = 0.02, y = header_y, label = "Metric",
    hjust = 0, family = "Source Sans 3", fontface = "bold", color = "white", size = 5) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.78, y = header_y, label = "Curr.",
    hjust = 0, family = "Source Sans 3", fontface = "bold", color = "white", size = 5) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.93, y = header_y, label = "Prior",
    hjust = 0, family = "Source Sans 3", fontface = "bold", color = "white", size = 5) +
  # ── Data rows (data-driven, geom_text fine here) ────────────────────────
  geom_text(aes(x = 0.02, y = y, label = metric_clean), na.rm = TRUE,
    hjust = 0, family = "Source Sans 3", size = 5, color = "#222222") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 0.88, y = y, label = curr), na.rm = TRUE,
    hjust = 1, family = "Source Sans 3", size = 5, color = "#222222") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 1.0, y = y, label = prior), na.rm = TRUE,
    hjust = 1, family = "Source Sans 3", size = 5, color = "#888888") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = stripe_col) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(title = "Additional Metrics") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_void(base_family = "Source Sans 3") +
  theme(
    # plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2),
    plot.title  = element_text(family = "Source Sans 3", size = 22, face = "bold")
  )
```

::: 

```{r}
#| label: top_searches
#| results: asis

v_found <- df_searches_top |> 
  filter(is_successful == TRUE) |> 
  pull() |> 
  paste0(collapse = "; ")

v_fail <- df_searches_top |> 
  filter(is_successful == FALSE) |> 
  pull() |> 
  paste0(collapse = "; ")

cat(
  str_glue(
    "**Top Searches Where Applicant Selected Employer**:",
    "\n\n",
    "\\textcolor{{subtletext}}{{\\small {v_found}}}",
    "\n\n",
    "**Top Searches Where Applicant Failed to Find Employer**:",
    "\n\n",
    "\\textcolor{{subtletext}}{{\\small {v_fail}}}"
    )
)

```

```{r}
#| label: footer_text
#| results: asis
cat(str_glue(
  "\\fancyfoot[R]{{\\color{{footergray}}\\small Data Source: Emmy Mixpanel Web Analytics Platform $\\vert$ {df_pd$period} $\\vert$ Digital Services at CMS $\\vert$ Generated: {format.Date(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %R')}}}"
))
```
